text.title: project-spec/ folder shape
text.summary: The required directory tree for project-spec/. Each subfolder is a routing node with its own AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, never a bulk dump.

rule.statement: project-spec/ MUST be a directory containing both flat reference files and routing subdirectories — never a single .md file.
rule.rationale: One file collapses under its own weight past ~500 lines; agents load the whole thing per query. Subfolders let routing be selective.

list.item: project-spec/AGENTS.md — entry routing doc; lists each subdir + flat file with one-line purpose.
project-spec/mission.md — what this project IS, who it is for, what success looks like.
project-spec/glossary.md — domain vocabulary. Every term that appears in code or UI lives here.
project-spec/business-rules.md — invariants the system enforces. Each rule has an id and lists the code path that enforces it.
project-spec/data-model.md — canonical entity list + relationships. Source of truth above the ORM.
project-spec/auth.md — actors, roles, permissions, session model.
project-spec/deploy.md — hosts, services, deploy scripts. Where each surface runs.
project-spec/config-secrets.md — env-var inventory. Each var has source (1Password / env / file) and consumer.
project-spec/non-functional.md — performance, availability, security, accessibility targets.
project-spec/observability.md — logs, metrics, traces. What is emitted, where it lands, alert thresholds.
project-spec/invariants.md — system-wide invariants beyond business-rules (e.g. "every API response is JSON; no HTML errors").

rule.statement: Each subdirectory MUST contain its own AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md routing pair before any content file is added.
rule.rationale: Per-module coverage rule (workspace convention). Skipping the routing doc forces bulk-load and erases the selective-read benefit.

list.item: project-spec/domain/ — per-aggregate or per-bounded-context detail. Each subdir under domain/ is one aggregate.
project-spec/api/ — public contracts (REST endpoints, GraphQL schema, CLI commands). Per-surface subdirs.
project-spec/integrations/ — third-party systems we depend on. One file per integration: contract, failure mode, retry policy.
project-spec/decisions/ — ADR-style records. One file per decision, append-only.

antipattern.description: A single 1500-line project-spec.md at the project root.
antipattern.reason: Agents pull the whole file for any query; humans cannot diff per-section changes; merge conflicts cascade.
Forces an agent reading project-spec/ to ls every subdir blind; defeats the routing convention.
